titleStmt.title: SII 41.452: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 452. (A.R. No. 666 of 1905.) Tīrttamalai, Harur Taluk, Salem District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tīrthagirīvara temple on the hill at Tīrttamalai.

p.hi: Vijayanagara Vira-Dēvarāya-Uḍaiyar. Plavaṅga, Kanni, su. 10. Monday, Sothi (irregular) = 1427 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged. Mentions that when the Mahāpradhāni Lakkaṇṇa-Uḍaiyar was the governor of the area, one Keyidēva-irākuttar of Muḷvāyil gave the ubayamāṟgam (tax) in Kūḍalūr in Puṟamalai-nāḍu for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tīrttamalai-nāyanār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . man mahāmaṇdhalīsuran hariyarāya vipāṭaṉ śrīviratevarāya Uṭaiyar mahāpratāṉi Ilakkaṇṇa Uṭaiyaṟku
cellāniṉṟa palavaṅka varuṣattuk kaṉṉināyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu tecamiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cotināḷ muḷvāyil Irāku
Ikkavuḷiya Ammaṉ teva Irāku makaṉār keyiteva Irākuttar puṟamalaināṭṭu kūṭalūril Upayamāṟkattukku cellum kku matta rākutta
tirttamalai nāyanāṟku tirununtā viḷakku candrātittavaraiyum cella
keṅkaikkaraiyiṟ kārāmpacuvaik koṉṟa pāvattil pokak kaṭavārkaḷākavum
kampavāṇaṉ
Digital edition of SII 41.452 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
